title: (0.95.0) `Buoyancy` -> `BuoyancyForce` and `BuoyancyModels` -> `BuoyancyFormulations`

body:
Opening this PR so we can continue tinkering with the DynamicSmagorinsky tests to see if we can get them to run.

cc @tomchor
title: Reinstate DynamicSmagorinsky tests

body:
I recently encountered a bounds error when trying `WENOVectorInvariant` on a horizontally flat grid. 

The problem was two-fold
- the `Flat` interpolators were not updated to the new syntax
- we were using a wrong signature for interpolations in the WENO stencil that does not account for the grid topology
- (bonus!) there are no tests for `WENOVectorInvariant`

This PR should resolve these issues

edit, I will also remove the "no-grid" interpolation operators to not allow something like this.
title: Fix horizontally `Flat` WENO advection
Fix exported names from BuoyancyFormulations module

body:
Which now are tested also for `Flat` grids in the meridional direction. 

Required by https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl/pull/297
(see https://buildkite.com/clima/climaocean-ci/builds/2146#0193bf37-560c-4923-83d0-3a891fb843e7)
title: (0.95.2) Bugfix in the Polar BC
